items.name: Dagger
items.description: A fine blade.

items.name: Dagger of Shielding +2
items.description: Probably one of the most lovely weapons of its kind, truly a valuable item.

items.name: Dagger -5
items.description: This weapon is truly cursed. It is so foul as to heal its intended victim.

items.name: Dagger of Styx +2
items.description: After being hammered out this blade was quenched in the waters of that infamous nether river.  It is especially deadly against demons.

items.name: Dagger of Penetration +2
items.description: A weapon enchanted with the most powerful of magic.

items.name: Sting +3
items.description: A fabled weapon thought only to exist in legend until now. The possessor of this weapon can truly be counted among the worthy.

items.name: Dagger of Anti Magic +1
items.description: Arcane powers help make this weapon a worthy aid against magic.

items.name: Dagger of Spells +1
items.description: This item channels magical energy most efficiently, giving its owner a greater ability to invoke arcane power.

items.name: Frozen Viper +2
items.description: Forged in the times of the Dragon Wars as a potent defense against dragons.

items.name: Longsword
items.description: This heavy and crude weapon is preferred by none but the common thug.

items.name: Longsword +1
items.description: A fine blade for the experienced adventurer.

items.name: Longsword +2
items.description: A beautiful weapon that is a rare find even in the tales of legends.

items.name: Longsword +3
items.description: Easily the most beautiful weapon of its kind.  This blade speaks of lost kingdoms and battles won.

items.name: Flameheart +2
items.description: A fiery blade, able to inflict damage on creatures normally untouched but by the most powerful of weapons.

items.name: Frostblade +2
items.description: Truly a gift from the gods, for this weapon can freeze any being it strikes.

items.name: Sword of Resistance +2
items.description: The warrior behind this sword need fear no sorcery.

items.name: Longsword of Protection +2
items.description: As if with a mind of its own this sword fends off attacks against its master.

items.name: Sword of No Redemption -2
items.description: Each drop of enemies' blood drawn with this dire weapon is a curse on the house of the wielder.

items.name: Sword of the Lost Soul -3
items.description: The warrior who takes this blade into battle casts his soul in with fell and unpredictable tides.

items.name: Broadsword
items.description: A cumbersome weapon that looks far better at a distance.

items.name: Broadsword +1
items.description: A gleaming weapon of superior craftsmanship.

items.name: Broadsword +2
items.description: A weapon fit for a lord. This weapon will bring many a jealous stare.

items.name: Penetration Broadsword +2
items.description: Once thought to be buried with Drahkma the Merciless, this powerful weapon's true location will now spread like wildfire.

items.name: Two Handed Sword
items.description: It takes a true brute to use a weapon of this girth.

items.name: Two Handed Sword +1
items.description: This weapon would seem large and cumbersome if it wasn't for the fact that even in the hands of a novice, this weapon is deadly.

items.name: Two Handed Sword +2
items.description: Truly a mighty weapon. No robber knight has ever dreamed of possessing such a weapon.

items.name: Two Hand Electro Sword +2
items.description: A weapon forged by the god Xaphini for his mortal son.  Alas, he is long dead, but the magic lives on.

items.name: Sword of The Voltar +2
items.description: The sword of a fearsome warrior.  If you are capable of wielding it, your foes will fall like blades of grass before you.

items.name: Sword of Ill Repute -2
items.description: Death and misfortune ever follow the owner of this wicked artifact.

items.name: Sword of Defense +1
items.description: The lot of this sword's owner is to come away from battle unscathed.

items.name: Scimitar
items.description: Preferred by the crafty, this weapon is true only to a brave master.

items.name: Scimitar +1
items.description: A magical feel permeates this blade's fine lines.

items.name: Scimitar +3
items.description: An awesome weapon preferred by the skilled.  It is quite a rare find.

items.name: Scimitar of Speed +2
items.description: The preferred weapon of the rouge. This weapon will please the pickiest of pickpockets.

items.name: Scimitar of Trickery -2
items.description: A foul curse brought about by an evil druid so long ago. Even the gods do not remember why.

items.name: Scimitar of Dodging +2
items.description: This mystic weapon gives total protection from normal missile weapons.

items.name: Mace
items.description: Heavy but effective, this weapon is preferred by the holy warrior.

items.name: Mace +1
items.description: The gods have smiled on this beautiful dealer of mortal death.

items.name: Mace +2
items.description: Prized by the most noble of priests, this weapon is a great prize.

items.name: Mace of Destruction +3
items.description: This weapon is extremly powerful and has always been in the hands of evil.  Until now!

items.name: Nethermace +2
items.description: A bane to all those of a less than earthly origin.

items.name: Mace of Evil Heroism -2
items.description: This foul and licentious weapon will never be true to the one who relies upon it in battle.

items.name: Mace of Resistance +2
items.description: The innate power of this weapon will dispel the power of magiks hurled against its master.

items.name: Nunchuka
items.description: Made of polished teak, this weapon is useable only by the skilled.

items.name: Nunchuka +1
items.description: Shining studs appear to the untrained eye to be this weapon's only virtue.

items.name: Nunchuka +2
items.description: A mighty weapon in the hands of a monk, this weapon is prized by all.

items.name: Nunchuka of Speed +2
items.description: Never has a weapon of its kind been seen until now.  A monk's dream enacted.

items.name: Nunchuka of Dexterity +2
items.description: This weapon's master moves with great skill and stikes with superhuman accuracy.

items.name: The Sleeping Dragon -2
items.description: When one calls upon the powers of this item, they are nowhere to be found.  They are ever-present when no need exists.

items.name: The Four Winds +4
items.description: This device moves with the swiftness and subtlety of a zephyr, yet strikes with the force of a hurricane.

items.name: Nunchucka of Kanfir +3
items.description: The master of this weapon walks unseen.

items.name: Jo Stick
items.description: A specialized weapon effective only in the hands of the skilled.

items.name: Jo Stick +1
items.description: A specialized weapon effective only in the hands of the skilled.

items.name: Jo Stick +2
items.description: Both strong and light, this weapon can be deadly in the hands of a master.

items.name: Jo Stick of Speed +2
items.description: The speed of the gazelle and the quickness of the viper will aid the wielder of this item.

items.name: Jo Stick of Protection +2
items.description: This wonderous item is better than a suit of armor.  To parry any blow will be your greatest success.

items.name: Jo Stick of Rygar +4
items.description: The speed of the gazelle and the quickness of the viper will aid the wielder of this item.

items.name: Jo Stick of Tragedy -3
items.description: This vile black stick makes your enemies quicker and yourself more sluggish.

items.name: Morning Star
items.description: A crude, iron ball with spikes. This weapon is as difficult to wield as it is to gaze upon.

items.name: Morning Star +2
items.description: Light in the hand, this weapon can deal a powerful blow.

items.name: Morning Star +4
items.description: Feared by all, this is a very deadly weapon.  Legend says that it was created by a god as a gift to his mortal son.

items.name: Throwing Stars
items.description: These ancient weapons can be thrown with sufficient force to cause great damage twice per melee round.

items.name: Morning Star of Defense +2
items.description: This amazing device consists of a ball and chain which, aside from being a powerful weapon, is somehow capable of deflecting your opponent's attacks.

items.name: Morning Star of Pain -2
items.description: Aaagh!  Sharp pains shoot through your arms as you try to bring this weapon to bear.  What diabolical force created this?

items.name: Flail
items.description: A poorly made flail of limited worth and use.

items.name: Flail +2
items.description: This weapon seems to respond to mere thoughts.  It is indeed valuable.

items.name: Flail of Cat Tails +4
items.description: A cute name, but that is where the pleasantries end.  This weapon is feared by even its master.

items.name: Flail of Doom +5
items.description: The adventurer who masters this artifact need not sleep light.  Even to look its possessor in the eye takes a mighty foe.

items.name: Flail of No Hope -3
items.description: Certain doom is the fate of he who takes up this weapon in anger.

items.name: Flail of Devilish Dare +4
items.description: Woe be the netherbeast to confront a foe who brandishes this weapon.

items.name: Tip Sword
items.description: A combat-specialized weapon with an armor piercing tip.

items.name: Tip Sword of Stench -2
items.description: The olfactory emissions produced by this item cause its wielder to choke and gag whenever need is greatest.

items.name: Sword of The Powers +4
items.description: A treasure of unparalleled beauty and potency.  Handle it with care.

items.name: Penetration Tip Sword +2
items.description: A one-of-a-kind weapon, it is far more powerful than it looks.  It can penetrate any armor.

items.name: Short Sword
items.description: A cheap alternative to the bare fist.

items.name: Short Sword of Speed +2
items.description: Valued by the rouge, this weapon is a god-send in a cramped, fighting environment.

items.name: Short Sword +3
items.description: A small weapon that packs a punch as well as a hefty price.

items.name: Short Sword of Defense +2
items.description: For the rogue with a fear of pain, this blade offers a measure of extra security.

items.name: Sword of the Omen -3
items.description: This small blade brings visions of horrible destruction.  Before the end of the first new moon they invariable come true.

items.name: Sword of Regeneration +2
items.description: Something in the metal of this weapon causes flesh to heal so fast that one can see it happen.

items.name: War Axe
items.description: Preferred by stout fighters, this heavy and clumsy weapon is most effective -- if you can hit your foe.

items.name: War Axe +1
items.description: A well-balanced axe, this weapon is of obvious magical origin.

items.name: War Axe +2
items.description: A rare find indeed, this weapon is a most powerful friend.

items.name: War Axe +3
items.description: From the treasure chambers of a god, this mighty axe is capable of hewing down the most mighty of foes.

items.name: War Axe of Weakness -2
items.description: This cursed weapon must be from the bowels of hades itself.

items.name: War Axe of Strength +2
items.description: The muscles of this weapon's owner bulge with the forces of stone and the power of earth.

items.name: Throwing Stars +1
items.description: Light metal stars that find their target and deliver their sting.

items.name: Biting Vipers +1
items.description: A poisonous bite is the reward for any who fall prey to the vipers.

items.name: Throwing Axe
items.description: Handy in a pinch, but of limited quality.

items.name: Throwing Axe of Sketch +1
items.description: A most interesting weapon, it returns to the hand of its wielder as if by magic when thrown.

items.name: Throwing Axe +2
items.description: A beautifully balanced weapon from the forge of a superior craftsman.

items.name: Battleaxe
items.description: Heavy but cheap, this is the weapon preferred by the common man-at-arms.

items.name: Battleaxe +1
items.description: A heavy weapon, but of fine make to be sure.

items.name: Battleaxe of Varg +2
items.description: A beautiful weapon, it is commonly found with officers of the Comair infantry.

items.name: Battleaxe of Strength +2
items.description: A mighty weapon! He who can brag ownership of this weapon is a hard man.

items.name: Battleaxe +3
items.description: Might on the hoof.  Nobody dares cross the path of he who wields this mighty weapon.

items.name: Battleaxe of Death -2
items.description: Faaaughh!!  What sick wizardry is this?  It inflicts damage on the wrong side!

items.name: Quarter Staff
items.description: A sturdy shaft of oak.  Inexpensive, but you get what you pay for.

items.name: Quarter Staff +1
items.description: A single magical rune imbues this shaft of wood with mystical power.

items.name: Staff of Merlin +3
items.description: The surface of this lengthy staff pulses with long-forgotten energy, placed there by a master magician.

items.name: Quarter Staff +2
items.description: A mighty weapon for those who are not stout of body.

items.name: Quarter Staff
items.description: A light length of wood suitable for sparring.

items.name: Quarter Staff +3
items.description: A fine weapon of superior make and magic.

items.name: Bow
items.description: Made of fine wood, this bow will be of great use in the hands of a great warrior.

items.name: Perrin's Eye +3
items.description: The sight of the hawk will guide your shot to the target every time if this is your weapon.

items.name: Bow of Thumbs -3
items.description: A criminal creation is this.  Somewhere a vile wizard laughs.

items.name: Bow of Shalomar +2
items.description: This mystical weapon was thought to have been lost when the golden elves were banished from the Realmz. That does not now seem to be the case.

items.name: Bow +1
items.description: A handy weapon for dealing with foulness at a distance.

items.name: Darts
items.description: No description text is available for this item.

items.name: Dart of Hornet's Nest
items.description: Woe is the creature stung by this sinister dart.

items.name: Dart of Frost
items.description: Contemplate the chilling prick of this cold-hearted weapon. It brings a shiver to the spine of the world.

items.name: Dart of Mental Terror
items.description: A small, but sometimes useful item.  This seemingly simple dart can sunder the mind of those it strikes.

items.name: Dart of Poison
items.description: A truly vile idea to turn one of the most harmless of weapons into one of the most powerful.

items.name: Battlestaff +4
items.description: This ancient weapon's origin remains unknown.  Its creator must have been mighty indeed.

items.name: Staff of Protection +2
items.description: Favored with a mage of the more paranoid sort, this beautiful piece is a valuable ally.

items.name: Staff of Spells +2
items.description: A weapon for the aggressive of mind and body, this powerful weapon is worth a king's ransom.

items.name: Staff of FireBalls +1
items.description: This staff casts fireballs just as the spell.  Any class can use it and the power level is random per use.

items.name: Staff of Stones +2
items.description: This staff casts power level 7 Brim Stones as the priest spell of the same name.

items.name: Staff of Missiles +1
items.description: This staff acts as a Staff +1 except that it can cast Power Level 7 Magic Darts.

items.name: Spear
items.description: A sturdy shaft with a nasty point.

items.name: Spear +1
items.description: A fine weapon that is as deadly as it is easy to use.

items.name: Spear of Piercing +2
items.description: A marvelous spear believed stolen by Theleb K'aarna.

items.name: Spear of Might +3
items.description: Wielded by the proud defenders of Heshimite.  The haughty goddess has blessed this mighty weapon with the will to fight.

items.name: Spear of Wondrous Might +5
items.description: The name tells all. This is a legendary weapon even among the gods.

items.name: Club
items.description: Heavy and cumbersome.  This is the preferred weapon of those that rely on brute force.

items.name: Club +2
items.description: This magically-enhanced club is a delight to wield, even for those that normally shun such weapons.

items.name: Club of Pummeling +4
items.description: A mighty weapon that does double normal club damage in addition to its magical damage.

items.name: Arrow of Saphron +3
items.description: Used in the Saphrinie wars, these wicked shafts deal a mighty blow.

items.name: Arrow of Seeking
items.description: Its name implies its worth.  Though no more powerful than a normal arrow, it never misses.

items.name: Arrow of Lightning
items.description: A shocking surprise is in store for the recipient of this tricky arrow.

items.name: Arrow of Death
items.description: Merely nocking this arrow is enough to bring fear into the hearts of many.

items.name: Flaming Arrow
items.description: A normal bolt that sports a wicked flame.

items.name: Arrow Storm
items.description: These magical shafts split in mid-flight, causing damage from each of the numerous smaller warheads.

items.name: Exploding Arrow of Antioch
items.description: Enemies will flee before the destructive power of these projectiles.

items.name: Staff
items.description: A knotted and gnarled length of wood, treated and cured against the elements.

items.name: Stone Hammer
items.description: A crude weapon commonly used by primitives of all sorts.

items.name: Stone Axe
items.description: A heavy but effective weapon for dealing a might-crushing blow.

items.name: War Hammer
items.description: An effective weapon for dealing a might-crushing blow.

items.name: War Hammer +1
items.description: A large and cumbersome weapon. It does great damage if used correctly.

items.name: Pike Axe
items.description: A large and cumbersome weapon. It does great damage if used correctly.

items.name: Pike Axe +1
items.description: A large and cumbersome weapon. It does great damage if used correctly.

items.name: Halberd
items.description: A large and cumbersome weapon. It does great damage if used correctly.

items.name: Halberd +1
items.description: A large and cumbersome weapon. It does great damage if used correctly.

items.name: Throwing Daggers
items.description: Well-balanced daggers that are designed to be thrown by a skilled hand.

items.name: Throwing Daggers +1
items.description: Well-balanced daggers that have been enchanted to magically increase their accuracy.

items.name: Poison Throwing Daggers
items.description: Well-balanced daggers that have been tainted with a vile poison.

items.name: Throwing Hammer
items.description: Weighted for throwing, this can be a deadly projectile if the target can be hit.

items.name: Throwing Hammer +1
items.description: Lighter than a mundane weapon of the same type, this weapon can inflict a staggering blow.

items.name: Throwing Hammer +2
items.description: This item seems to fly on wings with a mind of its own to strike down any who dare approach its wielder.

items.name: Throwing Hammer +3
items.description: If a hammer could swat a fly on the wall at a hundred paces, this hammer would be the one to do it.

items.name: Battle Hammer
items.description: A heavy iron head for delivering an even heavier blow.

items.name: Battle Hammer +1
items.description: A tribute to the skill of the smith behind its creation.  It will not fail the warrior who takes it into battle.

items.name: Battle Hammer +2
items.description: The metal of this weapon vibrates with energy.  Its power will stagger the recipient of its blow.

items.name: Battle Hammer +4
items.description: A hammer of such might can rend the stone of mountains and shake the foundations of the earth.

items.name: Bag of Rocks
items.description: A dirty leather bag full of fist-sized rocks.

items.name: Bag of Boulders
items.description: A huge sack full of giant round stones.

items.name: Crossbow
items.description: Advanced technology for launching missles in combat.

items.name: Crossbow + 2
items.description: The magic and skill behind the creation of this item have given it ability beyond the greatest expectation.

items.name: Crossbow of Thumbs
items.description: Seek not protection behind a foul weapon such as this.  You shall find naught but death.

items.name: Death Dealer
items.description: Though not enchanted with any magical pluses, this device will do triple normal damage if you can but hit your target.

items.name: Crossbow +2
items.description: This weapon fires at double the normal rate.

items.name: Dagger +1
items.description: A simple dagger of fine make, enchanted with magic.

items.name: Stormbringer +5
items.description: Powerful magic has blessed this dagger to be capable of striking demons and devils a mighty blow.

items.name: Holy Venom +6
items.description: A divine gift from Yevlin for saving an army of Griffins.

items.name: War Hammer +5
items.description: A powerful weapon of unknown origin.

items.name: Bow of Champions +4
items.description: Only the mightiest and most worthy of archers can claim ownership of this piece.  It retains the skill of champions to guide its master's aim.

items.name: Sword of the Paladins +4
items.description: A mystic blade of divine origin.  Its wrath blasts evil from the earth, annihilating any fell creature that dares stand before it.

items.name: Hammer of Thor +7
items.description: The weapon of a god.  Is any mortal fit to wield such power?

items.name: Shuriken
items.description: Many spikes and sharp barbs will litter the ground.  This makes movement a real danger for those who do not watch their step.

items.name: Sling of Bullets +3
items.description: A hailstorm of bullets will pour forth from a simple leather sling.  This item is more than it would first appear.

items.name: Throwing Knife +5
items.description: A blade without equal.  So finely crafted is this knife that even veteran dwarven weaponsmiths stand back in awe of its craftsmanship.

items.name: Deaths Head Axe +4
items.description: A wondrous axe you captured from an astreal vault.  Without doubt its former owner thought it safe at the time.

items.name: Blade of the Underworld
items.description: A gift from an old goblin shaman for helping unite Shalutie with his lost tribe.

items.name: Blade of Blackpool +5
items.description: A mystic weapon of great power.  Its benefits are many, but it does have one negative.  It makes the wielder easier to hit.

items.name: Dumbfounder +3
items.description: This is an amusing weapon indeed when thrown.  Powerful magic will cause it to split in two and strike two adjacent targets.

items.name: Cobra Strike +4
items.description: Though it is disgusting to look upon, it is a mighty weapon in battle.

items.name: Excalibur +7
items.description: The mightiest weapon ever forged by the gods.  Even among the gods it is known as "The Hand of Justice"

items.name: Bull Whip +1
items.description: Made from fine oiled leather, this whips can strike an enemy at a distance.

items.name: Bull Whip +4
items.description: A magical oil gives this whip the ability to strike even the most elusive of foes.

items.name: Snake Bite +3
items.description: Unlike most whips this weapon must be used at close range. A deadly venom has been rubbed into the tip of this foul weapon.  The result is pain and death for those it strikes.

items.name: Rapier Whip +6
items.description: A magicaly enchanted diamond embedded in the tip will penetrate any armor.

items.name: Crack of Doom +7
items.description: An ancient weapon used in the very pits of hell to keep daemon slaves in line.  Few Daemons wish to taste its kiss.

items.name: Orcrist +6
items.description: Forged during the age of light, this mighty weapons small size hides its incredible powers.

items.name: Glamdring +6
items.description: Few are the foes that will stand against this mighty weapon.  It is capable of casting powerful spells.

items.name: Balthog +7
items.description: Forged by Agadordan himself, this evil tyrant of the Abyss has given his weapon such powers as to increase his already mighty powers.

items.name: Shadowhawk +7
items.description: Giving the wielder incredible speed is but one advantage of this beautiful sword.

items.name: Silvergrip +7
items.description: It appears to be but an ordinary sword of superior craftsmanship.  Appearances can be deceiving.

items.name: Firestorm
items.description: Invented by a senile fire giant who was attempting to construct a interior heating system, firestorm arrows will blanket an area with flames that persist for up to five rounds.

items.name: Snowstorm
items.description: Legend has it that snowstorm arrows were created by the goddess Icicle, patroness of frostbite, as a gift to a nomadic goblin tribe. Goblins still burn hundreds of icicles in an annual sacrifice of thanksgiving.

items.name: Rapier
items.description: The rapier is a simple, nonmagical weapon. It is light and well balanced, but difficult to use correctly. In the hands of a master it can parry any blow, and strike with incredible speed.

items.name: Rapier of the Wind +4
items.description: This fantastic rapier is the true weapon of the master swordsman. It lends its master the speed and grace of the wind.

items.name: Bow of the Elves +6
items.description: No description text is available for this item.

items.name: Net
items.description: A non-magical device for the thief and the archer which can be thrown over a victim, making them helpless for a short time.

items.name: Savage Winds +9
items.description: No description text is available for this item.

items.name: Steel Tooth +7
items.description: No description text is available for this item.

items.name: Cheters Blade +8
items.description: This weapon was once the weapon of Cheter.  Cheter was an aid to Charon, ferryman over the river Styx.  Cheter was slain while fighting at Charons side battling a powerful demon wishing to cross Styx without paying.

items.name: Warped Staff +8
items.description: The Warped Staff has the ability to play havoc with the mind.

items.name: Hammer of Giants +10
items.description: Found in an ancient crypt by Malicus, he allowed you to capture it as repayment for helping bring his brother to justice.

items.name: Flame Dancer +9
items.description: Few relics can match this dagger in either power or beauty.

items.name: Robe
items.description: An abrasive cloth that wears on both the skin and patience.

items.name: Robe of The Magi +2
items.description: This wondrous robe can be worn only by magical castes.  A true friend in a tight spot.

items.name: Robe of Enchanters +1
items.description: A delicate cloth that has been woven by the hands of nature.

items.name: Robe of Many Favors +1
items.description: A crafty magic robe that gives its wearer extra abilities.

items.name: Robe of Protection +1
items.description: Strong magic turns this outwardly plain robe into a valuable magical armor.

items.name: Robe of Spell Storing +1
items.description: This powerful garment allows its wearer to store more spell points when fully rested.

items.name: Robe of Speed
items.description: The god Hermes has bestowed upon this garment his own special touch.  Donning it shall gain you extra movement.

items.name: Robe of Strength
items.description: The god of war has a special place in his heart for the powerful mage, and this mighty robe is proof.

items.name: Robe of Vulnerability -2
items.description: A fine-looking garment, but its foul nature is most apparent.

items.name: Leather Armor
items.description: Made from the hide of some ill- fated creature.  The protection it offers is hardly worth dealing with the stench.

items.name: Leather Armor +3
items.description: Soft and supple, this well- fitting garment speaks of magic.

items.name: Leather Armor +6
items.description: A truly well-crafted garment. A slight sheen tells of its magical properties.

items.name: Leather Armor +9
items.description: Rarely has the making of such a fine suit of protection been witnessed.

items.name: Leather of Strength +9
items.description: This is the ultimate in organic- based armor.  Tough as dragon's hide, soft as lamb's skin.  It must be worth a king's fortune.

items.name: Leather of Darkness -2
items.description: Spawned from the pits of hell itself!  Woe is the adventurer who mistakes this for a suit of armor.

items.name: Chain Armor
items.description: Heavy and binding, but effective in stopping most awkward thrusts.

items.name: Chain Armor +3
items.description: A fine suit that fits as well as it looks.  It is comfortable to both mind and body to wear.

items.name: Mithril Chain Armor +6
items.description: A fortune in mithril was expended in the making, and any fool can see it was well worth the price.

items.name: Volted Chain + 9
items.description: This is the most incredible suit of its kind ever devised.  Even for the gods, this is a treasured garment.

items.name: Banded Armor
items.description: A somewhat rusty, but effective metal skin.  Strong is the man who wears it with ease.

items.name: Banded Armor +3
items.description: A superior craftsman was surely the creator of this fine suit.

items.name: Banded Armor +6
items.description: Powerful protection from almost any attack.

items.name: Armor of Imprisonment -3
items.description: This suit looks innocent enough until you try it on.  What twisted wizard created such poison as this?

items.name: Plate Armor
items.description: Extremely heavy and expensive.  If the enemy won't get you, poverty will.

items.name: Plate Armor +3
items.description: A fine-looking suit of armor.  Nobody can deny the true value of such a metal skin.

items.name: Mithril Plate +6
items.description: Crafted from the most valuable of metals in the eyes of a smithy.  This suit is truly a treasure.

items.name: Plate Armor +13
items.description: A truly awesome suit of armor.  Its gleam is only outdone by the protection it provides.

items.name: Plate of Imprisonment -3
items.description: The ultimate in diabolical intentions.  Somewhere an evil god laughs.

items.name: Plate Armor +9
items.description: A culmination in the art of magical protection. This suit's strong magic would make any wizard cry with desire.

items.name: Plate Armor of Magicks +13
items.description: This most valued of armors gives its wearer an innate resistance to magic of all kinds.

items.name: Plate Armor of Scorland +12
items.description: The prized armor of king Scorland, this worthy treasure imbues many fine attributes required by both beggar and king.

items.name: The Chastised Warrior -5
items.description: This foul prison steals all the qualities a man might wish to gain from its use.  This is indeed without precedence.

items.name: Gauntlets +8
items.description: Strange magic makes these finely-crafted gauntlets glow with a strange light.

items.name: Gauntlets +12
items.description: Sought after by the most experienced wizards, these gauntlets are a true find.

items.name: Gauntlets +16
items.description: Powers such as those used to create these gauntlets are rare indeed.  Some whisper that the gods themselves are the originators.

items.name: Gauntlets +24
items.description: These gauntlets radiate so that none but the moronic will deny the power of their bearer.

items.name: Gauntlets +30
items.description: The finest of their kind. These were once a gift from one powerful god to another.  How they came to the Realmz is only guessed at.

items.name: Gauntlets of The Void
items.description: Contemplate what is worst in men, and you will find a portrait of he who created this filth.  Baaahhh! They hurt even to look at!

items.name: Cloak of Fog +3
items.description: A source of protection for those capable of defending the possession of it.

items.name: Cloak of the Magi +6
items.description: Truly a sweet release to the troubled conscience.

items.name: Cloak of Small Folk +12
items.description: Wearable by only small races. The most powerful of magic blesses this fine garment.

items.name: Cloak of the Outcasts +12
items.description: This wondrous cloak is wearable only to mixed races.  Made by a wizard who looked kindly upon the outcasts of society.

items.name: Cloak of Protection +6
items.description: Its very name implies its value.

items.name: Shadow Cloak +9
items.description: No other than a true monk may wear this cloak.  It was only rumored to exist.  The Four Seasons seek this cloak for their own gain.  How can four split one?

items.name: Cloak of Light +10
items.description: To be worn only by the crusader.

items.name: Cloak of Regeneration
items.description: A true treasure.  Buried with the Duke of Evenlase, this cloak was thought to be lost to all but the gods.

items.name: Cloak of Power +5
items.description: Capable of giving supernatural powers to its wearer, this cloak is one of the most sought after prizes ever known.

items.name: The Whistling Winds +10
items.description: If one listens closely, the voice of the ancient powers that created this cloak can be heard.  Great was their power.

items.name: Concealer of Lies +8
items.description: A rogues best friend, if that is even possible.  None but a rogue may wear this powerful piece.

items.name: Cover of Darkness -3
items.description: Many have considered the possible good that could have been done with the huge amounts of raw power used to create this cursed cloak.

items.name: Padded Cloak
items.description: A fine cover that lends a small amount of protection from both foes and the elements.

items.name: Padded Armor
items.description: Thick cloth stuffed with thick cords of animal hair.  This suit is hot but less cumbersome than leather or other armors.

items.name: Padded Armor +9
items.description: Magically enchanted to offer a little extra protection.

items.name: Cape of Everlasting Life
items.description: An unending flow of life-force comes from this magical robe healing all those of non-Elven heritage.

items.name: Emerald Alloy Plate +10
items.description: The metalurgy behind such an item is beyond comprehension. Somehow the emerald in the metal gathers mystic energy to ward off attacks.

items.name: Robe of Tranquility
items.description: Sought after by the most experienced wizards, this robe is a true find.

items.name: Gauntlets +3
items.description: Basic protection for those that cannot be hindered in battle.

items.name: Mithril Plate +20
items.description: A gift from a dwarven blacksmith in exchange for a large quantity of mithril steel.

items.name: Spirit Cloak +6
items.description: Captured from an evil Audible Spirit who had a passion for torturing victims with Razor Claws.

items.name: Helm
items.description: This is a tortuous rendition of finer helms.  A true delight to remove.

items.name: Helm of Pain -1
items.description: A cursed helm originating from a sadistic wizard who enjoyed the torment of the Man-At-Arms.

items.name: Helm of Might +2
items.description: This wondrous helm is a boon to the fighter class.

items.name: Helm of True Sight +3
items.description: This mighty artifact is capable of many wondrous things, the least of which is to ferret out hidden passages and illusions.

items.name: Helm of Defense +5
items.description: This strange looking but awesome helm gives the wearer resistance to chemical damage.

items.name: Helm +4
items.description: Strong magicks will come to the aid of the wearer of this fine helm.

items.name: Helm +3
items.description: Strong magicks will come to the aid of the wearer of this fine helm.

items.name: Helm of Kranack +4
items.description: Easily one of the most sought after relics of old. It is a strong ally to the brave.

items.name: Helm of The Vikings +5
items.description: Created by an evil elven god to aid him in battle, it was turned aginst him in a battle with rivals.  It now aids any who can claim it.

items.name: Helm of Speed +4
items.description: Power will seep into the feet of the wearer of this magical piece.

items.name: Helm of Heroism +6
items.description: One of the most prized of prizes.

items.name: Winged Helm of Zephron +10
items.description: The mark of a powerful warrior, this extraordinary helm is a treasure of kings.

items.name: Dunce Cap -6
items.description: A sick perversion.  This evil cap was a gift from an evil mage in an attempt to enslave a rival.

items.name: Cap of Spells +2
items.description: A snug fit allows the easy conveyance of the power-giving magicks of this fine cap.

items.name: Cap of The Magi +5
items.description: One of the most sought after relics by mages of all orders.  It is truly a powerful cap.

items.name: Cap of Protection +6
items.description: Found in the tomb of some ancient wizard, it was the prize of a hard fought battle with a lich.

items.name: Cap of Regeneration +3
items.description: Its simple appearance can easily throw even the most astute of sages.

items.name: Cap of Defense +6
items.description: Is it said that the posessor of this fine cap is immune to many spells?

items.name: Shield
items.description: Sturdy and strong, this shield will stop many a strong swing, if used properly.

items.name: Shield +3
items.description: The most ancient of magicks allow this shield to come to the aid of its user.

items.name: Shield of Vulnerability -1
items.description: A sick perversion of the most ancient magic, one who looks for aid is beseiged with peril.

items.name: Iron Scales +4
items.description: Truly a rare find, this shield will help defend against physical damage.

items.name: Shield +5
items.description: Brute magical force has turned this shield into a powerful aid.

items.name: Shield +6
items.description: The culmination of magic and armor.  This magical item is valued like no other.

items.name: Shield of Hawk Sight +6
items.description: The marvelous shield is valuble not only as protection, but as an aid in the darkness.

items.name: Dragon Breath +5
items.description: For the warrior jealous of the dragon's breath.

items.name: Shield of Shields +12
items.description: Nobody knows whence it came or why, but it is considered the ultimate defensive device.

items.name: Shield of Healing +10
items.description: This great gift allows the user to cast healing spells.

items.name: Shield of the Blue Oxen +4
items.description: This wondrous shield allows its user to regenerate from old wounds.

items.name: Shield of Magicks +3
items.description: A strong defense against arcane magicks.

items.name: Shield of Happenstance +6
items.description: This shield seems as an ordinary magical shield in all ways, however the bearer seems to have most excellent fortune.

items.name: Shield of Entanglement -2
items.description: This shield seems to trip the bearer during battle.  What trickery is this?

items.name: Shield of Protection +1
items.description: This marvelous shield allows the user to cast spells of protection.

items.name: Gloves of Wizardry +2
items.description: Only sorcerers and enchanters may wear these fine gloves, all else should keep their distance.

items.name: Gloves of The Seasons +8
items.description: Unable to wear gloves, the four seasons developed a magical cover for thier hands.  None will benefit but the loyal monk.

items.name: Gloves of The Huntsman +4
items.description: Favored by the archer, these gloves will do good for no other.

items.name: Plate Gauntlets
items.description: Heavy and rough, these gloves are common and cheap.

items.name: Gauntlets of Damage +1
items.description: Only non magical classes may use these gloves, a gift from the god of war.

items.name: Fists of Steel +1
items.description: With the aid of magic, a character can increase their brawn while in possession of these mighty gloves.

items.name: Gloves of Trickery -15
items.description: Gloves of Trickery -15

items.name: Gloves of Trickery +2
items.description: Gloves of Trickery +2

items.name: Gloves of Regeneration +1
items.description: Useable by any caste, these gloves are considerd the most powerful of their kind.

items.name: Gauntlets of Regula +4
items.description: These fine gloves were worn by Regula the crusader in his trips to Hell.  They are well known and feared by all evil spawn.

items.name: Gauntlets of Pain -2
items.description: This foul curse is considered one of the most painful.  One will never play the flute again if worn too long.

items.name: Gorgon Kin -3
items.description: Repugnant is the adventurer who falls for this curse.  Somewhere a gorgon laughs.

items.name: Gauntlets of Combat +2
items.description: These are valuble gloves for the man who likes to brawl.

items.name: Tiger Paws +4
items.description: Mystical gloves that render the wearer resistant to magic.

items.name: Dragons Claws +8
items.description: Prized by all, these gloves will lend great defence to the wearer.

items.name: Gauntlets of Deception -2
items.description: These gloves appear to be magical of a beneficial nature.  Too bad they are not.

items.name: Iron Cap
items.description: Protection yes, but it feels like a steel vise.

items.name: Leather Cap
items.description: Old cracked leather provides a minimal amount of protection for the melon.

items.name: Silk Gloves
items.description: Fine silk of amazing strength lend a small amount of protection without interfering with agility.

items.name: Leather Gloves
items.description: Loose fitting and poorly made, these gloves are barely adequate for the job.

items.name: Chain Gloves
items.description: Sturdy links of steel provide excellent protection for the hands.

items.name: Leather Boots
items.description: Comfortable boots made of soft leather, they offer some protection from the elements.

items.name: Steel Shod Boots
items.description: Heavy but they offer good protection.

items.name: Boots of Quick Step
items.description: These boots not only  make the foot feel fleet, but make you fleet of foot.

items.name: Boots of Quiet
items.description: Only the dreaded hill panther will make less noise than the wearer of these enchanted boots.

items.name: Boots of Balance
items.description: These boots will allow the wearer to perform acrobatic acts previously not possible.

items.name: Combat Boots +2
items.description: These magical boots increase the wearer's ability to inflict damage on an opponent during combat.

items.name: Deaths Head Shield +2
items.description: A demonic looking shield with a deadly secret.

items.name: Fistful of Missiles +7
items.description: Capable of casting a magical bolt of energy at will.

items.name: Maliki's Revenge +8
items.description: Maliki's Revenge +8

items.name: Emeral Alloy Shield +12
items.description: The metalurgy behind such an item is beyond comprehension. Somehow the emerald in the metal gathers mystic energy to ward off attacks.

items.name: Band of the Unicorn +15
items.description: The leader of the White Unicorn church was slain by a blue dragon decades ago. His shield has been part of the dragons treasure horde until now.

items.name: Sir Robbins Shield -6
items.description: HA HA HA: Sir Robbin, Sir Robbin, he bravely ran away away, Brave, Brave Sir Robbin!

items.name: Saurons Bane +9
items.description: Forged when the world was young and magic flowed upon the land like water.

items.name: Hellsbane +11
items.description: Created by Chetnyet the Brave in his quest to rid Hell of all devilkin.  Such a fool who believes that hell can fall to the likes of just one man.

items.name: Ruby Shield +10
items.description: Inlaid with large genstones, the value of this shield is more than cosmetic.

items.name: Hells Caretaker +15
items.description: Forged by the arch devil, Cambium for the Blood Wars of the Lava Rift.  How it found it's way to the Realmz is unknown.

items.name: Quiver of Arrows
items.description: Sturdy shafts that fly straight and true.

items.name: Hands of Magic
items.description: Capable of adding damage to any melee attack.  These gloves are favored by any who relish close quarter fighting.

items.name: Helm of Feona +7
items.description: A gift from the people of Sneflinbing for having saved the life of Flibli.  A cherished gnomish priest of Snelflinbig.

items.name: Razor Claws + 4
items.description: Also known as "Back Scratchers" these razor sharp claws allow the wearer to do extra damage in any melee attack.
